CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL( WcCoefficient__c ) ) , IF(ISNULL(CreditWC__c ),0,CreditWC__c ) * WcCoefficient__c * Quantity__c * IF( Name1__c = "ソフトウェア(画面/帳票作成)",1.2 , 1) , UnitPrice__c * IF(ISNULL(UnitPriceCoefficient__c),1,UnitPriceCoefficient__c) * Quantity__c * IF( Name1__c = "ソフトウェア(画面/帳票作成)",1.2 , 1) )
CustomField.label: 金額
